'''shajongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadcraft|roadcraft]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadcraft|roadcraft]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shajongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæjengeth|shæjengeth]] || [[word:shæjengej|shæjengej]] || [[word:shæjengesh|shæjengesh]] || [[word:shæjenge|shæjenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shajojongoth|shajojongoth]] || [[word:shajojongoj|shajojongoj]] || [[word:shajojongosh|shajojongosh]] || [[word:shajojongo|shajojongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shajongoth|shajongoth]] || [[word:shajongoj|shajongoj]] || [[word:shajongosh|shajongosh]] || [[word:shajongo|shajongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shajofngofth|shajofngofth]] || [[word:shajofngofj|shajofngofj]] || [[word:shajofngofsh|shajofngofsh]] || [[word:shajofngof|shajofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shajongotho|shajongotho]] || [[word:shajongojo|shajongojo]] || [[word:shajongosho|shajongosho]] || [[word:shajongoko|shajongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shajongoth|shajongoth]] || [[word:shajongoj|shajongoj]] || [[word:shajongosh|shajongosh]] || [[word:shajongo|shajongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shajongothol|shajongothol]] || [[word:shajongojol|shajongojol]] || [[word:shajongoshol|shajongoshol]] || [[word:shajongokol|shajongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shajongoothotho|shajongoothotho]] || [[word:shajongoojojo|shajongoojojo]] || [[word:shajongooshosho|shajongooshosho]] || [[word:shajongooko|shajongooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shajongothon|shajongothon]] || [[word:shajongojon|shajongojon]] || [[word:shajongoshon|shajongoshon]] || [[word:shajongokon|shajongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shajongothooro|shajongothooro]] || [[word:shajongojooro|shajongojooro]] || [[word:shajongoshooro|shajongoshooro]] || [[word:shajongokooro|shajongokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|1e8b6ef}}
